title: LOVE AND LOGIC PARENTING CLASSES - 211info
text: LOVE AND LOGIC INSTITUTE LOVE AND LOGIC PARENTING CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers parenting classes that focus on helping children learn from their mistakes and experience the natural consequences of their choices. Locator Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 6:30am-3:30pm. Class hours vary.
